ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Continued To Jun-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:16:14 a.m. and concluding at 11:26:35 a.m.

Ronnie Chow, Esq. appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Fedex Corporate Services, Inc.
No appearance by Defendant Consilium Enterprises, Inc.

BRAD VIPPERMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and placed under direct examination.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Fedex Corporate Services, Inc. and against Defendant Consilium Enterprises, Inc.

Plaintiff Fedex Corporate Services, Inc. is awarded judgment against Defendant Consilium Enterprises, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal: $36,754.19
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,613.24
Costs: $530.00
Attorney Fees: $1,200.00
Total Judgment: $44,097.43

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit Proposed Judgment to The Court for review and signature. (D505)
